command: for d in packages/opencode/src/*/; do echo "DIR: $d"; ls "$d"/*.ts 2>/dev/null | head -5; done
reason: List top-level TS files in each src subdirectory

command: test -f packages/opencode/src/index.ts && echo "EXISTS" || echo "NOT FOUND"; ls packages/opencode/src/index.* 2>/dev/null || echo "no index files in src/"
reason: Check if index.ts exists at src/ level
